settings.content:
## decipher.ms — Web Analytics
Cloudflare-style RUM, sourced from Application Insights `ai-decipherms-wu2-1`. Web Vitals come from the browser `web-vitals` library (attribution build); client IP / country / browser / OS are enriched server-side by App Insights ingestion. Default window: 7d.
settings.title: decipher.ms — Web Analytics

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
pageViews
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| summarize Views = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart

content.Query:
pageViews
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| summarize Views = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
pageViews
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| summarize Visits = dcount(session_Id) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart

content.Query:
pageViews
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| summarize Visits = dcount(session_Id) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
pageViews
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| summarize ['Page load p75 (ms)'] = percentile(duration, 75) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart

content.Query:
pageViews
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| summarize ['Page load p75 (ms)'] = percentile(duration, 75) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
pageViews
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend path = tostring(parse_url(url).Path)
| summarize Views = count(), Visitors = dcount(session_Id) by path
| top 15 by Views desc

content.Query:
pageViews
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend path = tostring(parse_url(url).Path)
| summarize Views = count(), Visitors = dcount(session_Id) by path
| top 15 by Views desc

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
pageViews
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where isnotempty(client_CountryOrRegion)
| summarize Views = count() by client_CountryOrRegion
| top 15 by Views desc

content.Query:
pageViews
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where isnotempty(client_CountryOrRegion)
| summarize Views = count() by client_CountryOrRegion
| top 15 by Views desc

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
pageViews
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where isnotempty(client_Browser)
| summarize Views = count() by client_Browser
| top 10 by Views desc

content.Query:
pageViews
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where isnotempty(client_Browser)
| summarize Views = count() by client_Browser
| top 10 by Views desc

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
pageViews
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where isnotempty(client_OS)
| summarize Views = count() by client_OS
| top 10 by Views desc

content.Query:
pageViews
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where isnotempty(client_OS)
| summarize Views = count() by client_OS
| top 10 by Views desc

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend ref = tostring(customDimensions.referrer)
| where isnotempty(ref)
| summarize Hits = count() by ref
| top 10 by Hits desc

content.Query:
customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| extend ref = tostring(customDimensions.referrer)
| where isnotempty(ref)
| summarize Hits = count() by ref
| top 10 by Hits desc

settings.content:
## Core Web Vitals
Each metric: rating split (good / needs-improvement / poor) over time, plus drilldowns by URL / Browser / OS / Country / Element (Element = CSS selector of LCP target, largest CLS shift source, or INP interaction target).
settings.title: Core Web Vitals

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
customMetrics
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where name in ('LCP','INP','FCP','TTFB')
| summarize P75_ms = percentile(value, 75) by bin(timestamp, 1h), name
| render timechart

content.Query:
customMetrics
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where name in ('LCP','INP','FCP','TTFB')
| summarize P75_ms = percentile(value, 75) by bin(timestamp, 1h), name
| render timechart

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
customMetrics
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where name == 'CLS'
| summarize ['CLS p75'] = percentile(value, 75) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart

content.Query:
customMetrics
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where name == 'CLS'
| summarize ['CLS p75'] = percentile(value, 75) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
customMetrics
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where name == 'LCP'
| extend rating = tostring(customDimensions.rating)
| summarize Count = count() by rating
| render piechart

content.Query:
customMetrics
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where name == 'LCP'
| extend rating = tostring(customDimensions.rating)
| summarize Count = count() by rating
| render piechart

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
customMetrics
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where name == 'LCP'
| extend rating = tostring(customDimensions.rating)
| summarize Count = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h), rating
| render columnchart with (kind=stacked)

content.Query:
customMetrics
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where name == 'LCP'
| extend rating = tostring(customDimensions.rating)
| summarize Count = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h), rating
| render columnchart with (kind=stacked)

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
customMetrics
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where name == 'LCP'
| extend dim = tostring(customDimensions.element), rating = tostring(customDimensions.rating)
| where isnotempty(dim)
| summarize Samples = count(),
            P75 = round(percentile(value, 75), 2),
            ['% Poor'] = round(100.0 * countif(rating == 'poor') / count(), 1),
            ['% NI'] = round(100.0 * countif(rating == 'needs-improvement') / count(), 1)
            by ['Element'] = dim
| top 10 by Samples desc

content.Query:
customMetrics
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where name == 'LCP'

            P75 = round(percentile(value, 75), 2),
            ['% Poor'] = round(100.0 * countif(rating == 'poor') / count(), 1),
            ['% NI'] = round(100.0 * countif(rating == 'needs-improvement') / count(), 1)
            by ['Element'] = dim
| top 10 by Samples desc

            P75 = round(percentile(value, 75), 2),
            ['% Poor'] = round(100.0 * countif(rating == 'poor') / count(), 1),
            ['% NI'] = round(100.0 * countif(rating == 'needs-improvement') / count(), 1)
            by ['OS'] = dim
| top 10 by Samples desc
